steps.title: Identify what a zero means
steps.content: A value of $x$ where $f(x)=0$ is an $x$-intercept of the graph. So the question is asking how many times the complete graph touches or crosses the horizontal axis.

steps.title: Count the intercepts
steps.content: Scanning the graph from left to right, the curve crosses the $x$-axis exactly once. There are no other intercepts in the complete graph. The answer is B.
